subject: Summer mortgage rush: The 2-minute response advantage
previewText: Why mortgage LOs who respond in 2 minutes beat competitors by 391% this season

featuredArticle.title: How to Buy Mortgage Leads That Actually Convert: Real-Time vs Aged Leads Guide
featuredArticle.spotlight: Stop burning money on overpriced real-time leads that don't convert. This guide breaks down the economics of real-time vs aged mortgage leads, plus the conversion strategies that make aged leads your secret weapon for consistent deal flow.

quickTips: Beat Online Lenders With Local Advantage
